harnessValidate.summary: Harness validation passed after aligning AGENT.md and the design harness workflow on the runtime-smoke browser exception.

baseline.summary: Baseline verification passed on the final rerun: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 223 tests passed, 15 skipped.

dbCheck.summary: Supabase contract check passed for 18 SQL files during the final guard run.

guardVerify.summary: Final verify guard passed after syncing the active work to this harness-doc update; design guard passed with no guarded UI files changed, diff guard passed for 3 changed files, and evidence guard passed.

issuesObserved: The design harness workflow still implied that in-app browser checks only happen on explicit request, even though current harness policy requires browserRuntime evidence for runtime entrypoint changes.
harnessImprovementProposal: Keep browser usage optional by default, but document the runtime-entrypoint exception consistently in AGENT.md and the design harness workflow.
retrospective.reason: This was a repeatable operator-guidance mismatch in the durable harness docs, so the fix belongs in the docs rather than in one-off session notes.
